title: Communauté de communes du Pays Neslois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Pays Neslois is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in May 1964. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de l'Est de la Somme in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Pays Neslois is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in May 1964. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de l'Est de la Somme in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 24 communes:
